CreateBillingApiKeyRequest.description:
Self-service API key creation — v1.2.4 audit P0-1 successor
of the former ``POST /v1/infra/keys``.
CreateBillingApiKeyRequest.title: CreateBillingApiKeyRequest

detail.description: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence.

instance.description: URI reference identifying the specific occurrence.

title.description: Short human-readable summary of the problem type.

type.description: URI reference identifying the problem type.

params.description: Parameters to pass to the tool.

tool.description: Name of the tool to execute.
Name of the tool that was executed.

RestoreDatabaseRequest.description:
Restore from a previous backup.

Either ``filename`` (preferred — matches what ``list_backups`` /
``backup_database`` now return) or ``backup_path`` (legacy — full
path inside the backup dir) may be provided. ``filename`` is
resolved server-side against ``A2A_DATA_DIR/backups`` so callers
never need to know the absolute path.
RestoreDatabaseRequest.title: RestoreDatabaseRequest

tier_required.description: Minimum tier required to use this tool.

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key passed directly in the X-API-Key header (alternative to Bearer).
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key

BearerAuth.description: API key passed as Bearer token in the Authorization header.

X402Payment.description: x402 payment proof for stateless authentication.
X402Payment.name: X-PAYMENT

get.description: Kubernetes liveness probe — no auth, no DB.
Kubernetes readiness probe — checks billing DB.

post.description: Execute multiple tool calls in a single request.

get.description:
List API keys owned by the authenticated caller.

v1.2.4 audit P0-1: this is the non-admin self-service path.
``create_api_key`` is reused as the ``require_tool`` anchor
(it is NOT in ``ADMIN_ONLY_TOOLS``) so free/pro tiers reach
this handler without hitting the admin gate. The handler then
calls the ``_list_api_keys`` implementation directly, always
scoped to the authenticated caller's ``agent_id`` via ownership.

post.description:
Create a Stripe Checkout session for credit purchase.

Body:
    {"package": "starter"} — use preset package
    {"credits": 5000}      — custom amount ($1 = 100 credits)

get.description:
Stream events via Server-Sent Events (SSE).

Requires API key via Authorization header.
Accepts query params:
  - event_type (optional): filter by event type
  - since_id (optional): only events after this ID
  - agent_id (optional): filter events by source agent
Accepts headers:
  - Last-Event-ID: resume from this event ID (overrides since_id)

post.description:
Execute a tool. Wraps the real implementation so EVERY response
— success, 410 moved, 4xx, 5xx — carries RFC 8594 deprecation
headers (Deprecation + Sunset + Link rel=sunset).

add_agent_to_org.summary: Add an agent to an organization.

atlas_broker.summary: One-call brokering: discover → preflight → create payment intent.

atlas_discover.summary: Enriched agent discovery: marketplace search + trust breakdown + reputation + ratings → Atlas Score.

atlas_preflight.summary: Pre-transaction verification: endpoint reachable? trust OK? wallet active? pricing unchanged?

backup_database.summary: Create a hot backup of a SQLite database, optionally encrypted with Fernet.

best_match.summary: Find the best matching services for a query with ranking.

build_claim_chain.summary: Build a Merkle tree from an agent's attestation history for verifiable claim chains.

cancel_escrow.summary: Cancel a held escrow and refund the payer.

cancel_subscription.summary: Cancel an active or suspended subscription.

cancel_verification.summary: Cancel a pending or running verification job.

check_db_integrity.summary: Run SQLite integrity check and return page diagnostics for a database.

check_performance_escrow.summary: Check if a performance-gated escrow's metric threshold is met and auto-release if so.

check_sla_compliance.summary: Check if a server meets its claimed SLA using trust probe data.

convert_currency.summary: Convert funds between currency balances for an agent. Withdraws from source currency and deposits converted amount to target currency.

create_api_key.summary: Create a new API key for yourself (self-service). Only same-agent or admin can create.

create_escrow.summary: Create an escrow between two agents. Funds are held from payer immediately.

create_intent.summary: Create a payment intent between two agents.

create_performance_escrow.summary: Create an escrow that auto-releases when payee's verified metrics meet a threshold.

create_split_intent.summary: Create a split payment across multiple payees with percentage-based distribution.

create_subscription.summary: Create a recurring payment subscription between two agents.

create_wallet.summary: Create a new wallet for an agent (self-service onboarding).

delete_server.summary: Delete a server and all its associated trust data (probes, scans, scores).

delete_webhook.summary: Delete (deactivate) a webhook by its ID.

deposit.summary: Deposit funds into an agent's wallet in a specific currency.

estimate_cost.summary: Calculate projected cost of N calls to a specific tool without executing them.

freeze_wallet.summary: Freeze a wallet, blocking all deposits and withdrawals. Admin only.

get_agent_identity.summary: Get the cryptographic identity and public key for an agent.

get_agent_leaderboard.summary: Rank agents by total spend, calls, trust score, revenue, or rating.

get_agent_reputation.summary: Get the consumer-side reputation score for an agent.

get_balance.summary: Get the current wallet balance for an agent in a specific currency.

get_budget_status.summary: Get current spending vs budget caps and alert status for an agent.

get_claim_chains.summary: Get stored Merkle claim chains for an agent.

get_dispute.summary: Get details of a dispute by its ID.

get_escrow.summary: Get details of an escrow by its ID.

get_event_schema.summary: Retrieve the registered JSON schema for an event type.

get_events.summary: Query events from the event bus with optional type filter and offset.

get_exchange_rate.summary: Query the exchange rate between two supported currencies.

get_global_audit_log.summary: Get the global audit log across all agents (admin operation).

get_intent.summary: Get details of a payment intent by its ID.

get_messages.summary: Get messages for an agent (sent and received).

get_metric_averages.summary: Get pre-computed rolling averages for an agent over a specified period (7d, 30d, or 90d).

get_metric_deltas.summary: Get performance deltas (current vs previous value) for an agent across all metrics or a specific metric.

get_metrics_timeseries.summary: Get per-agent usage metrics bucketed by hour or day.

get_payment_history.summary: Get payment history for an agent.

get_proof.summary: Retrieve a formal verification proof artifact by ID.

get_revenue_report.summary: Get revenue report for a provider agent (incoming payments).

get_service.summary: Get a marketplace service by its ID.

get_service_analytics.summary: Get usage analytics for an agent (total calls, cost, tokens).

get_service_ratings.summary: Get ratings and reviews for a marketplace service.

get_subscription.summary: Get details of a subscription by ID.

get_transactions.summary: Get the transaction ledger for an agent (deposits, withdrawals, charges).

get_trust_score.summary: Get the trust score for a server.

get_usage_summary.summary: Get usage summary (total cost, calls, tokens) for an agent.

get_verification_status.summary: Get the current status and result of a verification job.

get_verified_claims.summary: Get all verified metric claims for an agent (e.g., Sharpe >= 2.0).

get_volume_discount.summary: Calculate discounted price based on historical usage volume.

get_webhook_deliveries.summary: Get delivery history for a webhook endpoint.

github_create_issue.summary: Create an issue in a repository.

github_get_file_contents.summary: Get file contents from a repository.

ingest_metrics.summary: Ingest time-series metric data points for an agent. Supports optional Ed25519 signature verification for authenticated submissions.

list_api_keys.summary: List all API keys for an agent. Returns truncated key hash prefix, tier, scopes, and created_at (never the full key or hash). Supports pagination via paginate=true.

list_backups.summary: List all available database backup files.

list_disputes.summary: List disputes where the agent is opener or respondent.

list_escrows.summary: List escrows for an agent, optionally filtered by status.

list_intents.summary: List payment intents for an agent, optionally filtered by status.

list_strategies.summary: List signal provider strategies in the marketplace.

list_subscriptions.summary: List subscriptions for an agent (as payer or payee).

list_verification_jobs.summary: List verification jobs for an agent with optional status filter.

list_webhooks.summary: List all registered webhooks for an agent. Supports pagination via paginate=true.

negotiate_price.summary: Start a price negotiation with another agent.

open_dispute.summary: Open a dispute against an escrow.

partial_capture.summary: Partially capture a pending payment intent for a specified amount.

pg_describe_table.summary: Describe a table's columns and types.

process_due_subscriptions.summary: Trigger processing of all due subscriptions and expired escrows.

publish_event.summary: Publish an event to the cross-product event bus.

query_metrics.summary: Query time-series metric data for a specific agent and metric name, with optional time range filtering.

rate_service.summary: Rate a marketplace service (1-5). One rating per agent per service (upsert).

refund_intent.summary: Refund a payment intent: voids if pending, reverse-transfers if settled.

refund_settlement.summary: Refund a settled payment (full or partial). If amount is omitted, refunds the full remaining balance.

register_agent.summary: Register a cryptographic identity for an agent. Generates Ed25519 keypair.

register_event_schema.summary: Register a JSON schema for an event type in the event bus.

register_server.summary: Register a new server for trust tracking.

register_service.summary: Register a new service in the marketplace.

register_webhook.summary: Register a webhook endpoint to receive event notifications.

release_escrow.summary: Release escrowed funds to the payee.

remove_agent_from_org.summary: Remove an agent from an organization. Cannot remove the last owner.

resolve_dispute.summary: Resolve a dispute by refunding payer or releasing funds to payee.

restore_database.summary: Restore a SQLite database from a backup file, with optional decryption.

revoke_api_key.summary: Soft-delete (revoke) an API key by its hash prefix. The key will no longer be usable for authentication.

rotate_key.summary: Rotate an API key: revoke the current key and create a new one with the same tier.

search_agents.summary: Search for agents by capability keywords. Searches service names, descriptions, tools, tags, and categories. Supports pagination via paginate=true.

search_agents_by_metrics.summary: Search for agents with verified metric claims (e.g., find bots with Sharpe >= 2.0).

search_servers.summary: Search for servers by name or minimum trust score.

search_services.summary: Search the marketplace for available services. Supports pagination via paginate=true.

send_message.summary: Send a typed message to another agent.

set_budget_cap.summary: Set daily/monthly spending caps and alert thresholds for an agent.

submit_metrics.summary: Submit trading bot metrics (Sharpe, drawdown, latency, etc.) for platform attestation.

submit_verification.summary: Submit a formal verification job. Each property can be written as raw Z3 SMT-LIB2 (language='z3_smt2') or as a structured JSON policy (language='json_policy', compiled server-side to SMT-LIB2). Returns a job ID for tracking.

test_webhook.summary: Send a test ping event to a registered webhook and return the delivery result.

unfreeze_wallet.summary: Unfreeze a wallet, allowing deposits and withdrawals again. Admin only.

update_server.summary: Update a server's name and/or URL.

update_service.summary: Update fields on an existing marketplace service.

verify_agent.summary: Verify that a message was signed by the claimed agent.

verify_proof.summary: Verify a formal verification proof by its SHA3-256 hash. Returns validity status.

withdraw.summary: Withdraw funds from an agent's wallet in a specific currency.

get.description:
List API keys — admin only (fleet view).

v1.2.4 audit P0-1: ``list_api_keys`` is now in
``ADMIN_ONLY_TOOLS`` so non-admin callers are rejected by
``require_tool`` with 403 ``admin_only``. Non-admin callers
should use ``GET /v1/billing/keys`` for their own fleet.

When called by an admin, returns keys for ALL agents (fleet
view) because ownership is bypassed for admin tier.

post.description: Deprecated: self-service key creation moved to /v1/billing/keys.

get.description: Return enriched OpenAPI spec with onboarding guide.

Return the tool catalog with optional pagination.

Query params:
    limit (int, optional): Max number of tools to return. Negative values ignored.
    offset (int, optional): Number of tools to skip. Default 0.
    cursor (str, optional): Opaque cursor from previous page's next_cursor.
Return pricing grouped by service for a quick overview.
Return a human-readable comparison of all API tiers.
Return pricing info for a single tool.

post.description: Register a new agent: create wallet + free-tier API key.

Handle Stripe webhook events.

On checkout.session.completed → deposit credits to agent's wallet.

get.description:
Return a helpful error when a plain HTTP request hits the WS endpoint.

This happens when Cloudflare or another reverse proxy strips the
``Upgrade: websocket`` header.  A 426 status code tells the client
that the server requires a protocol upgrade.
